entities.name: Superposition
entities.context: AI-driven recruiting product built around a conversational voice agent for hiring managers

entities.name: Voice Agent
entities.context: Conversational AI that interviews founders/hiring managers to understand roles

entities.name: LLM-legible composite spec
entities.context: Output format produced by ingesting JDs and voice interviews into a machine-readable role specification

entities.name: Outcome pricing
entities.context: Business model philosophy of charging based on results rather than subscription

entities.name: Success-fee model
entities.context: Pricing approach charging roughly 10% of salary for successful placements

entities.name: Great human recruiter reasoning
entities.context: Product thesis that hiring should replicate how skilled human recruiters think, not brittle filters

relationships.context: Core workflow centers on voice agent interviewing hiring managers
System produces composite specs from JDs and interviews
Strong focus on outcome-based pricing vs subscription
Charges 10% of salary for successful placements
Voice agent interviews feed into producing the composite spec
Product thesis that system should replicate human recruiter reasoning
Success-fee model is an implementation of outcome pricing philosophy
